title: oldenlandia griffithii
intro: Oldenlandia griffithii, also known as Griffith's oldenlandia, is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Oldenlandia griffithii include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Oldenlandia griffithii is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, and powders, and is also used in traditional medicine to create remedies such as tonics and ointments.
